title: Sea Monkey Simulator
tagline: Grow a tiny colony into a thriving neon ecosystem.
description: Balance food, oxygen, and tank upgrades while your sea monkey colony expands through calm management loops.

title: Microcosm
tagline: Guide a single-celled organism through a luminous microscopic arena.
description: Absorb glucose, amino acids, and ATP while dodging predatory protozoa and viscous gel zones in a stylized microscope world.

title: Space Runner
tagline: Dash the ring-depth and blast through alien swarms.
description: Lane-shift, jump, and fire your way through a fast arcade run while your ship health and speed pressure climb.

title: Moonjet Cavern
tagline: Thread a jetpack astronaut through narrow lunar caverns.
description: Tap to thrust, avoid stone pillars, and chase high scores in this tight one-button arcade challenge.

title: Alien Invasion
tagline: Pilot your UFO and demolish the city skyline.
description: Bomb buildings, dodge tank fire, and survive wave after wave in this arcade destruction run.
